title: Foreign and National Collaborations
content: Foreign and National Collaborations The selected students have options to do their 8th semester at a nominal fee at the University of Florida & Nebraska, USA. All those students who have gone so far got assured admissions in their MS program and have taken up jobs in USA. Foreign Collaborations SD Mines University, South Dakota, USA University of Florida, Florida, USA Florida Agriculture and Mechanical University, Florida, USA Iowa State University, USA University of Missouri, USA Tel Aviv university, Israel Pushchino Scientific Centre for Biological Research of the Russian Academy of Science (PSCBR-RAS), Russia National School of Applied Sciences (ENSATg), Morocco Pokhara University, Kaski, Nepal.
